title: HENBRANDT 6 x Princess Party Boxes for Kids 3 Assorted Designs 14 * 9.5 * 12cm Birthday Party Takeaway Lunch Box Gift Box Party Favours Goodies and Treats Empty Cardboard Picnic Boxes for Food
features: Pack of 6 Princess Party Boxes for kids in 3 assorted designs. The assortment of designs sent will be based on availability.

These themed party boxes are perfect for packing up lunches, picnic meals, birthday cake, snacks, sweets, treats, takeaways, and party goodies, and they make great alternatives to wrapping paper for small gifts and birthday presents.
The Princess party boxes are made from premium food-grade cardboard and have been designed specifically to store your snacks and keep your lunch fresher for longer.
Size: 14cm (L) x 9.5cm (W) x 12cm (H). The party lunch boxes are sent flat but are easy and hassle-free to assemble – simply unfold into shape and slot the tabs into place!
This product has been tested to EN and REACH regulations and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements.
description: These brightly coloured cardboard lunch boxes with regal Princess designs are great for packing up the remnants of party buffets and picnics and sending home with guests, or filling with snacks, treats and party favours to be opened after the festivities have concluded. Alternatively, use the princess party boxes as gift boxes for presents and make gift wrapping easy! There are 3 assorted Princess designs available, subject to availability. The cardboard lunch boxes are sent flat but are easy to assemble, no glue or sticking tape required – simply unfold into shape and slot the tabs into place! When assembled, the lunch box measures 14cm (L) x 9.5cm (W) x 12cm (H) / 5.5inch x 3.7inch x 4.7inch. The treat boxes are made from premium food-grade cardboard, so are ideal for birthday parties, picnics, school trips, and more. Pack of 6 per order. This product has been tested to EN and REACH regulations and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Dry foods, Lunch, Picnic, Snacks, Treats
